text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm… I wonder if this is enough snacks. Now I just need juice—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …That's quite a lot of shopping—Chrono.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Bouquet!? 
A-Ah, Th-This is…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
W-Well, you see… Um… 
I just had a sudden craving for some snacks… J-Just kidding…!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case—let me help you carry them.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Th-Thank you very much. I'm sorry for making you help me…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…Kind as always… 
But I'm glad she didn't find out…)

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: Umm, is this enough paper chains? It's about 1/100th of a mile long!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: 『We can just put the plates around here, right. And line up the food over here～♪』

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: If that's the case—it might be a good idea to get some paper napkins ready, too.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
『Uh-huh』…!? 
…B-… 
『Bouquet!? Why are you here!?』

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Ah… S-Sorry. 
Everyone looked so busy preparing, so…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…Is there a party today…? Earlier, 
Chrono was buying lots of snacks too—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
If you are celebrating someone, 
please let me help out.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, well you see～… 
We appreciate the offer to help, but…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
It's a surprise party, so… 
The details are top secret. 
…Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…? 
Y-Yes… Understood.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: And, like this—in flower arrangement, pairing contrasting colors makes it look vibrant—giving off the perfect impression for a special day.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: 『It totally does～!』

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: This side is finished! Where should we hang it!?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Let's see… I chose flowers with a subtle fragrance for those, so they can go on the dining table—

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. In the end, Bouquet just bundled 
us all together.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
But, you know. It's because Bouquet is 
the way she is—

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …With this, the preparations are complete. I'm sure it will be a wonderful party… I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Yes. …Hehe. 
I'm really glad, too.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
『…For today's party… Actually… 
The one being celebrated is…』

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Bouquet! 
It was you～!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …Eh!?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Eh… 
M-Me? Wh-Why!?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: 『Because! Bouquet, you're always so kind to everyone… You're a truly gentle person!』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: We decided to throw a surprise party to show our gratitude! I'm so glad… We actually managed to surprise you…!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
N-No way… For me… 
I-I'm so honored…!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hehe, modest as always. …But, you know. Just for today, we need Bouquet right in the center.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, it wouldn't make a beautiful, well-balanced "bouquet"… 
Don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
…I understand. Everyone… 
Thank you, truly.
And so, a wonderful party that would be talked about for a long time was held.
